text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It really is hard, isn't it? ...Oh well.
choice_data_list: Looks like I have to keep trying until—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! No, Trainer, stop right this instant!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Don't let yourself get sucked into this. You've
already done more than enough, so let's just walk
away.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: U-um, but... I had a lot of fun playing it with you!
